# Changelog - Sindri v3

All notable changes to Sindri v3 (Rust) will be documented in this file.

The format is based on [Keep a Changelog](https://keepachangelog.com/en/1.0.0/),
and this project adheres to [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/spec/v2.0.0.html).

<!-- Entries below are auto-generated by release workflow -->

## [3.1.3] - 2026-03-22

### Fixed

- fix(fly): prevent health check failures during startup (43e87a2)

### Maintenance

- chore(extensions): upgrade 22 extensions to latest software versions (1531403)
- chore(release): update v3 CHANGELOG and bump to v3.1.3 for development (20815d1)

### Installation

#### Docker Image
```bash
# Pull the Docker image
docker pull ghcr.io/pacphi/sindri:3.1.3

# Run a container
docker run -d --name sindri \
  -e INSTALL_PROFILE=minimal \
  -v sindri_home:/alt/home/developer \
  ghcr.io/pacphi/sindri:3.1.3
```

#### CLI Binary
```bash
# Download and install from release assets
# Linux (x86_64)
wget https://github.com/pacphi/sindri/releases/download/v3.1.3/sindri-v3.1.3-linux-x86_64.tar.gz
tar -xzf sindri-v3.1.3-linux-x86_64.tar.gz
sudo mv sindri /usr/local/bin/

# macOS (Apple Silicon)
wget https://github.com/pacphi/sindri/releases/download/v3.1.3/sindri-v3.1.3-macos-aarch64.tar.gz
tar -xzf sindri-v3.1.3-macos-aarch64.tar.gz
sudo mv sindri /usr/local/bin/
```

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/pacphi/sindri/compare/v3.1.2...v3.1.3

## [3.1.0] - 2026-02-25

### Added

- feat(extensions): upgrade 11 extensions to latest stable software versions
  - agent-browser 0.9.3 → 0.15.0 (major jump)
  - agentic-qe 3.7.1 → 3.7.7 (patch)
  - ai-toolkit: gemini CLI 0.27.1 → 0.30.0 (minor)
  - cloud-tools: aws-cli 2.33.21 → 2.33.30, gcloud 556 → 558, aliyun 3.2.9 → 3.2.10, doctl 1.150 → 1.151, flyctl 0.4.11 → 0.4.15
  - haskell: ghcup 0.1.30 → 0.1.50.2 (significant)
  - infra-tools: packer 1.14 → 1.15, pulumi 3.220 → 3.223, crossplane 2.1.4 → 2.2.0, kapp/ytt/vendir/imgpkg patch bumps
  - mdflow 2.33 → 2.35.5 (minor)
  - nodejs-devtools: prettier 3.6 → 3.8, eslint 9 → 10 (major)
  - python: Python 3.13 → 3.14, uv 0.9 → 0.10
  - php: PHP 8.4 → 8.5
  - supabase-cli 2.76.4 → 2.76.15 (patch)
- feat(extensions): add packer to infra-tools BOM for complete SBOM tracking

### Changed

- Extension metadata version bumps for all 11 updated extensions
- Updated compatibility matrix for agent-browser version range (now >=1.0.0)

### Fixed

- fix(compatibility): correct 3.1.x matrix ranges — only require higher minimums for 11 extensions with actual software upgrades
- feat(extensions): add draupnir to compatibility matrix and registry

## [Unreleased]

### Added

- **RunPod provider** - Deploy Sindri environments on RunPod with 40+ GPU types
  - HTTP REST API integration (no external CLI required)
  - Support for on-demand and spot instances (60-70% savings)
  - Network volume support for persistent storage across pod terminations
  - CPU-only pods for non-GPU workloads
  - Three-tier storage: container disk, pod volume, and network volume
  - SSH access via proxy (all pods) and public IP (full SSH/SCP/SFTP)
  - GPU pool IDs for flexible GPU selection
  - Per-second billing with no minimum commitments
  - 31+ data centers across North America, Europe, and Asia-Pacific
  - Comprehensive documentation at `v3/docs/providers/RUNPOD.md`

- **Northflank provider** - Deploy on Northflank with auto-scaling and GPU support
  - CLI-based deployment workflow via `northflank` CLI
  - Native pause/resume for cost optimization (zero compute cost when paused)
  - Auto-scaling with CPU/memory triggers (15-second metric intervals)
  - Health check support (HTTP, TCP, and command probes)
  - GPU support (L4, A100 40/80GB, H100, H200, B200, AMD MI300X)
  - 20+ compute plans from 0.1 to 20 vCPU
  - Persistent SSD volumes up to 1.5 TB
  - Port forwarding for local access without public exposure
  - 16 managed regions + 600+ BYOC regions
  - Comprehensive documentation at `v3/docs/providers/NORTHFLANK.md`

- **10 new example configurations** in `v3/examples/` for RunPod and Northflank
- feat(schema): add `runpod` and `northflank` to deployment provider enum in JSON schema
- feat(config): add `RunpodProviderConfig` and `NorthflankProviderConfig` Rust types

### Documentation

- docs(providers): add RunPod provider guide (`docs/providers/RUNPOD.md`)
- docs(providers): add Northflank provider guide (`docs/providers/NORTHFLANK.md`)
- docs: update DEPLOYMENT.md with RunPod and Northflank provider comparison, GPU support, and secrets management
- docs: update CONFIGURATION.md with RunPod and Northflank provider-specific configuration blocks
- docs: add complete examples for RunPod GPU training and Northflank auto-scaling
- docs: update providers README.md with RunPod and Northflank entries

## [3.0.0] - TBD

_GA release placeholder. See [3.0.0-rc.3] and earlier pre-releases for cumulative changes._

## [3.0.0-rc.3] - 2026-02-12

### Fixed

- Replace hardcoded dev paths with `get_home_dir()` for portable home directory resolution
- Convert `.expect()` crash points to proper `Result` returns for graceful error handling
- Replace `std::sync::RwLock` with `tokio::sync::RwLock` in async context to prevent deadlocks
- Replace `unreachable!()` macro calls with error returns to avoid panics in edge cases
- Use `CARGO_PKG_VERSION` for user-agent strings instead of hardcoded version values

### Documentation

- Clean up CHANGELOG structure (remove phantom 3.1.0 and placeholder 3.0.0 entries)

## [3.0.0-rc.2] - 2026-02-11

### Breaking Changes

- **Event-driven extension status**: Replaced `manifest.yaml` with append-only event ledger (`~/.sindri/status_ledger.jsonl`). Users upgrading from previous versions must reinstall their extensions. See [ADR-043](docs/architecture/adr/043-event-driven-status.md).

### Added

- **Event ledger system**: All extension lifecycle operations (install, upgrade, remove) now publish events to an append-only ledger for instant status queries and complete audit trails
- **`sindri extension verify`**: New command to explicitly verify installed extensions are working correctly
- **`sindri ledger compact`**: Compact ledger by removing old events (default: 90-day retention)
- **`sindri ledger export`**: Export ledger events to JSON for auditing
- **`sindri ledger stats`**: Show ledger statistics (event counts, file size, timestamps)
- **`sindri extension status --verify`**: Optional flag for slower but thorough verification
- **`sindri extension status --limit`**: Limit number of history entries shown
- **`sindri extension status --since`**: Filter events by date

### Changed

- **`sindri extension status`**: Now reads from event ledger (<1s) instead of running subprocess verification (17+ seconds)
- Extension install, upgrade, and remove operations now publish events with timing and error context

### Removed

- `manifest.yaml` file and `ManifestManager` module (replaced by event ledger)

- feat: v3 vm command (#57) (cba8fe5)
